title: Lomariopsis horsfieldii
taxonomy: Lomariopsis horsfieldii is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It belongs to the genus Lomariopsis, which is a group of ferns that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Lomariopsidaceae is a part of the larger group of ferns known as Polypodiopsida. This classification suggests that Lomariopsis horsfieldii is a member of the broader fern clade. The fern's classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its frond structure and reproductive features.
